keyPoints: Sacred Struggle framing as the guiding north star for design and user practice.
Hybrid visibility: invisible background AI with surfaced explanations at critical junctures.
Flow and perceived autonomy prioritized alongside performance and learning depth.
Sensemaking scaffolds paired with surfaced outputs to sustain accountability.
Task- and phase-sensitivity to AI visibility levels across domains.
Governance, human-in-the-loop, and override controls to protect agency.
Longitudinal focus on sustainable skill development and resistance to over-reliance.
